content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all four changed files end-to-end. Three targeted fixes: (1) MilestoneProgress::remaining() now correctly excludes in_progress and blocked beads from the remaining count, fixing a semantic bug where those beads were double-counted as both their actual status and as 'remaining'; (2) br_list_exit_error_looks_corrupt removed filename-based patterns (.beads/issues.jsonl, issues.jsonl) that caused false positives — a missing file was misclassified as corrupt data — and added better corruption signals (json parse, decode error); (3) is_planned_elsewhere_scope_label added nongoals and acceptancecriteria so compact summaries skip those structural headings. All changes have corresponding test additions and expectation updates. 748 tests pass. 13 clippy warnings are pre-existing and unrelated to this diff. remaining() is only used in format_milestone_progress for prompt rendering, so the semantic change has no unintended downstream impact. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
